case_title: MARIN EREMIA VS. JACK'S MARKET, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF EREMIA, MARIN AS TO DEFENDANT JACK'S MARKET, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PLAINTIFF MARIN EREMIA AND DEFENDANT JACK'S MARKET, INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2025 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY EREMIA, MARIN AS TO DEFENDANT JACK'S MARKET, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MAHMOUD MOHAMED FILED BY DEFENDANT JACK'S MARKET, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EREMIA, MARIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACK'S MARKET, INC. $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,300.00, BY JANUARY 23, 2025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY EREMIA, MARIN JACK'S MARKET, INC.
